name: Chickpea Vindaloo
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large saute pan.
Cook the onion over medium heat for 2 minutes.
Stir in the ginger, garlic, cumin, turmeric, cinnamon stick, cardamom pods, bay leaf, and cayenne. Cook for 2-3 minutes longer, or until the onion is very soft.
2. Increase the heat to high and stir in the mushrooms and tomatoes. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until most of the mushroom liquid has evaporated. Stir in the vinegar and bring to a boil.
3. Stir in the chickpeas, potatoes, vegetable stock, tomato paste, yogurt, salt, and pepper. Simmer the vindaloo for 10 minutes, or until the potatoes and chickpeas are tender. Add stock as necessary to keep the stew moist.
Just before serving, adjust the seasoning by adding vinegar, salt, or cayenne. Vindaloo should be very highly seasoned. Serve over basmati rice with dollops of yogurt and sprigs of cilantro.
